employee | customer | vendor

investigate | interview | suspend
terminate | coaching | no_action

span.p:
Closure requires:
- At least one action recorded
- Timeline entry: status_change
- FoxCaseAction: status_change
- outcome notes persisted

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Evidence chain verified before referral:
verify_evidence_chain(case_id)
DB function: verify_hash_chain()
Any broken link = investigation halt
